title: Ukrainian Glassy Tart Salad
description: A refreshing and tangy salad made with glassy and ukrainian ingredients, perfect for a light lunch or dinner.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the glassy and ukrainian salad.
2. In a small bowl, whisk together the jelly and 1 tablespoon of water until well combined.
3. Pour the jelly mixture over the glassy mixture and toss to coat.
5. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
